title: Create TFC Unofficial Port

body:
Create: TFC Unofficial Port
Let the gears of Create mesh with the bedrock of TerraFirmaCraft.
This is an unofficial compatibility port designed to bridge the gap between Create and TerraFirmaCraft: The Next Generation (TFC). It does not alter the core gameplay of either mod; instead, it provides deep recipe integration and machine interaction compatibility, allowing TFC's primitive forging systems to evolve naturally into Create's automated industrial age.
